compiled_state.title: hook_worktree_isolation_guard: blocks_without_marker and blocks_stale_marker tests failing — deny JSON not emitted
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh Group 3 tests fail with empty output:
  test_function_blocks_without_marker: expected '"permissionDecision": "deny"' but actual is empty
  test_function_blocks_stale_marker: expected '"permissionDecision": "deny"' but actual is empty

hook_worktree_isolation_guard() in plugins/dso/hooks/lib/session-misc-functions.sh is not outputting deny JSON when no valid auth marker exists.

## Impact
Tests pass when valid marker present but do not block when marker is absent or stale — auth-file allowlist enforcement is not verified.

## Pre-existing
Failures exist in checkpoint commit 0dd51c3c and pre-date current session changes.
